assignment: Independently replay and challenge the bounded queue composition conclusion without assuming DKR-2 implementation exists.
required_checks: Run the saved queue replay and verify every hash and checkpoint field from the repository root.
Build a fresh probe for zero messages, one delivery, burst above concurrency, handler failure, acknowledgement failure, lease loss, shutdown while active, and two sessions sharing one server scope.
Verify bounded concurrency, backpressure, exactly one activation exec per lease, acknowledge or reject ownership, graceful join, and zero cross-session tag or result leaks.
Verify receive, acknowledge, reject, lease validation, and timer wait are explicit required ports with zero hidden queue or timer effects.
Challenge whether a fixed worker loop plus controller(flow) and awaited promises covers all behavior; reject start, spawn, public pool, WorkerRegistry dispatch, or hidden timers.
Separate ordinary graceful shutdown from forced ExecutionContext close that remains conditional on accepted DKR-2 implementation.
Audit all walls and run store verification after governed output.
forbidden: Product code, tests, docs, manifests, git history, PR state, external services, frame, tree, or another worker's artifacts
Real GitHub or queue access, start, spawn, pools, hidden effects, WorkerRegistry dispatch, shared scope, or wall weakening
required_outputs: workers/validator-dkr-4/progress.jsonl via the absolute OKRA store helper worker-report command
terminal_condition: Finish with behavior, graph-edge, API-surface, dependency, and wall dispositions plus governed output.
